import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut count = 0
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 97 or b == 101 or b == 105 or b == 111 or b == 117
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("vowels=#{count}")
  when None
    println("vowels=0")
  end
end
